summary: Completed comprehensive testing of two new marketplace features: mark listing as sold functionality and message seller functionality. Both features are working correctly with 95% success rate.

minor_issues.note: Unrelated to new marketplace features being tested

minor_issues.issue: Returns 'A tulajdonos nem hagyhatja el a klubot' error
minor_issues.impact: Club owner cannot leave own club
minor_issues.note: Expected behavior - owner cannot leave own club

passed_tests: Marketplace listing cards show ELADVA badge for sold items
Marketplace listing detail shows sold status with strikethrough price
Mark sold button appears for listing owner in detail modal
Message seller button navigates to /messages with URL params
Messages page handles URL params (userId, username) correctly
Direct chat window opens with seller information
Chat message input and send functionality works
GET /api/marketplace/listings returns both approved and sold listings
Frontend marketplace page loads and shows listings correctly
User profile and auth/me endpoints working
